description: Ratchet baseline for scripts/check-ui-conventions.mjs. Counts may only shrink; regenerate with `npm run check:ui -- --update` after reducing violations.

allowlist.reason: Avatar group stacking uses negative -space-x overlap; gap-* cannot express negative spacing. Vendored shadcn pattern.

Colorful sidebar icons feature: user-enabled decorative multi-hue tinting of folder roles and tag colors (13 distinct hues with dark: variants). Non-text, WCAG 1.4.11 non-essential decoration; the 5 semantic status tokens cannot express the per-role/per-tag distinction the feature exists for.
